# Issue #2032: Changes to API comments aren't regenerated by generate-apiref

**Summary**: Changes to API comments aren't regenerated by generate-apiref

**Sources**: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kueue/issues/2032

**Last updated**: 2024-04-22T17:45:21Z

- **State**: closed (completed)

## Description

<!-- Please only use this template for submitting clean up requests -->

**What would you like to be cleaned**:

Currently, the changes in api comments are not regenerated by `generate-apiref`, discovered in https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kueue/pull/2025#pullrequestreview-2014845838

When running locally it fails like this:
```sh
> make generate-apiref
cd  /usr/local/google/home/michalwozniak/go/src/sigs.k8s.io/kueue/site/genref/ && /usr/local/google/home/michalwozniak/go/src/sigs.k8s.io/kueue/bin/genref  -o /usr/local/google/home/michalwozniak/go/src/sigs.k8s.io/kueue/site/content/en/docs/reference
I0422 16:40:45.419533 2863192 main.go:142] Parsing go packages in sigs.k8s.io/kueue/apis/kueue/v1beta1
E0422 16:40:45.426941 2863192 main.go:364] "cannot process API path" err="no loaded build package for sigs.k8s.io/kueue/apis/kueue/v1beta1"
I0422 16:40:45.426975 2863192 main.go:142] Parsing go packages in sigs.k8s.io/kueue/apis/config/v1beta1
E0422 16:40:45.434552 2863192 main.go:364] "cannot process API path" err="no loaded build package for sigs.k8s.io/kueue/apis/config/v1beta1"
I0422 16:40:45.434580 2863192 main.go:142] Parsing go packages in sigs.k8s.io/kueue/apis/kueue/v1alpha1
E0422 16:40:45.440996 2863192 main.go:364] "cannot process API path" err="no loaded build package for sigs.k8s.io/kueue/apis/kueue/v1alpha1"
```
The exit code is 0, which may explain why the build does not fail.

Using git bisect I found this PR as the culprit: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kueue/pull/1884.

**Why is this needed**:

To correctly generate API reference.
